summary: Iteration 37 testing completed. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Cookie banner fix working correctly on desktop (1920px) and tablet (768px). Monitoring dashboard displays all 10 system status cards. All new endpoints functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Cookie Banner Fix: .chat-trigger has transition on bottom property (line 642: transition:all 300ms...,bottom 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1))
✅ Cookie Banner Fix: body.cookie-visible .chat-trigger{bottom:100px} rule at line 850 (OUTSIDE mobile media query)
✅ Cookie Banner Fix: Desktop (1920px) - chat trigger at bottom:100px with banner, bottom:24px after accept
✅ Cookie Banner Fix: Tablet (768px) - chat trigger at bottom:120px with banner, bottom:24px after accept
✅ Cookie Banner Fix: Smooth transition animation when cookie banner dismissed
✅ GET /api/admin/monitoring/status: Returns consolidated system status (API, DB, Worker, Email, LLM, Payments, Webhooks, Memory/Audit, Dead Letter Queue)
✅ GET /api/admin/email/stats: Returns email delivery statistics (total, sent, failed, success_rate, recent_events)
✅ POST /api/admin/email/test: Sends test email via Resend with audit trail (email_events collection)
✅ POST /api/admin/billing/reconcile: Reconciliation across Quote/Contract/Invoice payment status
✅ GET /api/admin/webhooks/history: Returns webhook events audit log

✅ POST /api/admin/e2e/verify-flow: E2E flow verification with 6 check types (quote_has_invoice, contract_has_quote, payment_status_sync, reminder_on_paid, llm_provider_healthy, contract_evidence_complete)
✅ Frontend Monitoring View: 10 system status cards with color-coded status indicators (OK=green, FALLBACK=orange, NOT_CONFIGURED=yellow)
✅ Frontend Monitoring View: Refresh button functional, timestamp displayed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 features fully tested. Cookie banner fix verified on desktop (1920px) and tablet (768px) - chat trigger smoothly transitions from bottom:100px/120px to bottom:24px when cookie banner dismissed. Monitoring dashboard shows 10 system status cards: API, Datenbank, Worker/Queue, E-Mail (Resend), LLM/DeepSeek, Revolut, Stripe, Webhooks, Memory/Audit, Dead Letter Queue. LLM uses Emergent GPT fallback since DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is not set. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/monitoring/status, GET /api/admin/email/stats, POST /api/admin/email/test, POST /api/admin/billing/reconcile, GET /api/admin/webhooks/history, POST /api/admin/e2e/verify-flow.

cookie_banner_fix.desktop_1920px: ✅ Chat trigger at bottom:100px with banner, bottom:24px after accept
cookie_banner_fix.tablet_768px: ✅ Chat trigger at bottom:120px with banner, bottom:24px after accept
cookie_banner_fix.body_class: ✅ body.cookie-visible class applied when banner visible

email_delivery.stats_endpoint: ✅ GET /api/admin/email/stats returns total, sent, failed, success_rate, recent_events
email_delivery.test_endpoint: ✅ POST /api/admin/email/test sends via Resend with audit trail
email_delivery.audit_trail: ✅ email_events collection with category and ref_id

webhook_history.endpoint: ✅ GET /api/admin/webhooks/history returns webhook events audit log

mocked_apis.DeepSeek LLM API: Falls back to Emergent GPT since DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is empty (expected behavior)
